abilities.description: Draw a card. For each opponent, exile up to one target instant or sorcery card from that player's graveyard and put a page counter on it.
You may cast a spell from among cards in exile with page counters on them without paying its mana cost.

effect.description: You may cast a spell from among cards in exile with page counters on them without paying its mana cost.
effect.name: Play

triggers.description: Whenever you cast a spell you don't own, create a 3/3 black Demon creature token.
